task: View the speakers that are bluetooth and wireless and filter the results to only show models that are on sale and cost less than $50.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the requested filtering on Best Buy. Evidence shows it searched for bluetooth wireless speakers, applied the Features filters for Wireless and Bluetooth, applied the Price filters Less than $25 and $25-$49.99 (i.e. under $50), and then applied the Current Deals filter On Sale. The final page snapshot shows the active filter chips: Wireless, Bluetooth, Less than $25, $25 - $49.99, and On Sale, with results visible on the Best Buy search results page. This satisfies the task to view speakers that are bluetooth and wireless and filter results to only show models on sale costing less than $50.
final_result_response:
Done. I filtered Best Buy to show Bluetooth & Wireless Speakers that are:

- Wireless
- Bluetooth
- On sale
- Under $50

It’s showing 31 matching items.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Searching for speakers: await page.locator('e9').fill('bluetooth wireless speakers');
Applying Bluetooth, wireless, and price filters: await page.locator('e57').click();
Applying Bluetooth, wireless, and price filters: await page.locator('e58').click();
Applying Bluetooth, wireless, and price filters: await page.locator('e37').click();
Applying Bluetooth, wireless, and price filters: await page.locator('e38').click();
Filtering to on-sale models: await page.locator('e177').click();
Selecting On Sale filter: await page.locator('e68').click();
